title: Verify existing implementation of admin dashboard with charts and data tables
description: Admin dashboard with charts (StatsChart.tsx) and paginated data tables (UsersTable.tsx) already exists at src/app/(frontend)/admin/dashboard/page.tsx. The AdminDashboardClient.tsx manages state and fetches from /api/dashboard/admin-stats. Responsive grid layout is implemented. Task.json needs to be converted from text description to proper JSON format with hasUI: true flag.
existing_patterns: src/components/contacts/Pagination.tsx - existing Pagination component reused in UsersTable
src/app/(frontend)/admin/dashboard/page.tsx - SSR with auth checks and redirect
src/components/admin-dashboard/StatsChart.tsx - SVG bar chart pattern with data [{label, value, color}]
src/app/api/dashboard/admin-stats/route.ts - withAuth decorator pattern with role-based access
